Description: Bring summer clothes

Craft every item made out of crimson wood

Description: Craft every item made out of warped wood
Actual Requirements: See requirement notes below

Description: Explore every Nether biome
Actual Requirements: Enter the following biomes:

Description: Place one of every nether block in the overworld

Actual Requirements: See requirement notes below

Description: Hunt a Hoglin for food
Breed a baby Hoglin using Crimson Fungi
Get mauled by a Hoglin
Punch a baby Hoglin that is being ridden by a baby Piglin
Bring a Hoglin into the Overworld to zombify it, then kill it for zorkchops
Actual Requirements: Kill a Zoglin

Description: Distract Piglins with gold
Actual Requirements: Drop any golden item (in the piglin_loved tag) and have an adult Piglin pick it up. The player cannot be wearing any golden armor while doing this

Description: Slay a Piglin in battle... or an accidental incursion
Actual Requirements: Kill a Piglin or a Piglin Brute

Description: Bring a Piglin into the Overworld then spare it from an eternity of zombification
Give a piglin elytra then kill it
Barter for every possible type of item with Piglins
Actual Requirements: Pick up the following items that were thrown by Piglins:

Description: Give a total of 500 gold to Piglins during your nether adventures
Obtain a Piglin Head by blowing up a Piglin with a Charged Creeper
Actual Requirements: Obtain a Piglin Head

Description: Fight your way into a Bastion Remnant
Actual Requirements: Enter a Bastion Remnant
Notes: Known as "Not a Terrible Fortress" before added as a vanilla advancement in 1.10 Beta Build 10

Description: Defeat a Piglin Brute in a Bastion Remnant
Get murdered by Piglin Brutes
Send a Piglin Brute to the End and kill it there before it zombifies
Actual Requirements: Kill a Piglin Brute in the End

Description: Loot a chest in a Bastion Remnant
Actual Requirements: Open any Bastion Remnant chest for the first time

Description: Mine some Gilded Blackstone from a Bastion Remnant

Notes: Known as "Lava Fishing" until 1.12 Beta Build 3

Description: Ride a Strider with a Warped Fungus on a Stick
Actual Requirements: Obtain a Warped Fungus on a Stick AND ride a strider
Notes: Known as "SHROOM ON A STICK!" before added as a vanilla advancement in 1.10 Beta Build 10

Description: Take a Strider for a loooong ride on a lava lake in the Overworld
Actual Requirements: Ride a Strider at least 50 blocks horizontally away from your starting position, all on lava and in the Overworld

Description: Breed two Striders using Warped Fungus
Kill a Zombified Piglin that is riding a Strider and take its steed
Actual Requirements: Kill a Zombified Piglin that is riding a Strider AND ride a strider that was formerly ridden by one

Description: Ride a Strider riding another Strider riding a boat riding a minecart

Description: Rebuild and reactivate a Ruined Portal
Actual Requirements: Stand in a Nether Portal block while within the bounding box of a Ruined Portal structure

Description: Obtain Crying Obsidian from a ruined portal or bartering with Piglins
Notes: Known as "Radioactive" before added as a vanilla advancement in 1.10 Beta Build 10

Description: Craft a Respawn Anchor using Crying Obsidian and Glowstone then place it down
Actual Requirements: Place a Respawn Anchor

Description: Charge a Respawn Anchor to the maximum
Actual Requirements: Place Glowstone into a Respawn Anchor such that it reaches maximum charge

Description: Kill a zombie pigman
Kill a magma cube
Kill a chicken jockey in the nether
Actual Requirements: In the Nether, kill a chicken with any zombie variant as a passenger or any zombie variant riding a chicken
Notes: Known as "Legend of the Hell Chicken Rider" until 1.9

Description: Collect a stack of magma cream
Shoot down a ghast
Actual Requirements: Kill a ghast

Description: Block the explosion of a ghast's fireball
Look at a Ghast through a Spyglass
Destroy a Ghast with its fireball
Bring down a ghast with a sword
Actual Requirements: Kill a ghast using a direct melee attack while holding a sword

Description: Collect a stack of ghast tears
Rescue a Ghast from the Nether, bring it safely home to the Overworld... and then kill it

Actual Requirements: Strike a ghast with lightning using the Channeling enchantment

Description: Feed snowballs to a Ghastling
Craft a Harness, place it on a Happy Ghast, and ride it

Actual Requirements: Either the player's or Happy Ghast's "feet" (centre of the bottom of hitbox) must be within the bounding box of one of the village structures or roads

Description: Attach a Boat to a Happy Ghast using a Lead
Slay a Ghast while riding a Happy Ghast
Deflect a Ghast fireball into a Happy Ghast
Actual Requirements: This does not have to kill it

Description: Ring a bell in the Nether
Sit in water in the Nether
Actual Requirements: Sit in a cauldron filled with water in the Nether

Description: Start freezing in the Nether
Actual Requirements: Start freezing from Powder Snow in the Nether

Description: Mine Nether Gold Ore for a pile of gold nuggets
Actual Requirements: Mine Nether Gold Ore

Actual Requirements: Step on a Magma Block in the Nether without sneaking, wearing Frost Walker Boots, or having the Fire Resistance effect
Notes: Known as "Don't Step on it!" until 1.12 Beta Build 6

Description: Mine Blackstone from a Basalt Deltas biome
Mine a stack of Netherrack, Basalt, Blackstone and Magma in the Nether
You sink like quicksand and move slow like mud

Description: Get caught on Soul Fire

Mine some glowstone dust from the nether

Description: Achieve an absolutely insane speed by combining the Speed II effect, Dolphin’s Grace, Depth Strider III, Soul Speed III and sprinting
Completely use up a netherite hoe. Clearly you have chosen... poorly
Actual Requirements: Break a Netherite Hoe

Description: Mine a stack of Ancient Debris
Mine enough Ancient Debris to make a stack of Netherite Ingots (don’t worry, mining a stack of Netherite Blocks is optional in this datapack, I’m not that evil…)
Be an absolute madlad and grind enough Ancient Debris to make a stack of Netherite Blocks (this is hidden and not required for Advancement Legend btw…)
Notes: Originally added in 1.10 Beta Build 1, known as "Master Archaeologist", then removed in 1.10 Beta Build 9

Description: Hit something while you and it are in lava
Get above the roof in the nether
Actual Requirements: Be above y=128 in the Nether dimension

Description: Use the Nether to travel 7km in the Overworld
Stay in the Nether for twenty ingame days
